General.Name: Vinco Financial Group Ltd
General.Description: Zijing International Financial Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides various financial services in Hong Kong and Mainland China. It operates through Corporate Financial Advisory Services, Advising on Securities and Asset Management Services, Online Game Business, and Car Rental Business segments. The company offers corporate finance related services, including general corporate finance advisory services, placing and underwriting services, as well as initial public offerings related projects and securities advisory services. It also provides asset management services; sponsoring services to clients for their fund-rising activities; and engages in car rental businesses. The company was formerly known as Vinco Financial Group Limited and changed its name to Zijing International Financial Holdings Limited in July 2022. Zijing International Financial Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2008 and is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Shui On Centre, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
